title: Girls taught basics of rugby
description: MOSSEL BAY NEWS - Girls from Hillcrest, Sao...
bodyText: [{"type":"paragraph","text":"MOSSEL BAY NEWS - Girls from Hillcrest, Sao Bras and Great Brak high schools took part in an introductory rugby clinic, where they were taught the basics of the game, at the Great Brak rugby stadium.","html":"MOSSEL BAY NEWS - Girls from Hillcrest, Sao Bras and Great Brak high schools took part in an introductory rugby clinic, where they were taught the basics of the game, at the Great Brak rugby stadium."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"Instructed"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Mossel Bay-based South Western Districts (SWD) rugby coach Stanley Kama, SWD regional coach Sharmark Pedro, SWD schoolgirls' rugby programme manager Sihle Luyenge and SWD Youth Training Centre head coach for women and girls, Samuel Oktober, instructed the girls.","html":"Mossel Bay-based South Western Districts (SWD) rugby coach Stanley Kama, SWD regional coach Sharmark Pedro, SWD schoolgirls' rugby programme manager Sihle Luyenge and SWD Youth Training Centre head coach for women and girls, Samuel Oktober, instructed the girls."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"The clinic took place on Friday, 15 March.","html":"The clinic took place on Friday, 15 March."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"Motivating"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"The coaches tour Mossel Bay schools, motivating the girls to play rugby.","html":"The coaches tour Mossel Bay schools, motivating the girls to play rugby."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Kama said: \"We're looking forward to the rugby season and we encourage girls to play rugby and ask that their parents and schools support them.\"","html":"Kama said: \"We're looking forward to the rugby season and we encourage girls to play rugby and ask that their parents and schools support them.\""},{"type":"paragraph","text":"If you are interested in playing rugby, call Kama (081 090 6923) or Luyenge (076 776 2926).","html":"If you are interested in playing rugby, call Kama (081 090 6923) or Luyenge (076 776 2926)."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news.","html":"We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news."}]
